*** 1 INJ *** REPORTS FROM MULTIPLE SOURCES OF DAMAGE FROM AN APPARENT TORNADO IN THE WYNMOOR BROWARD COLLEGE NORTH CAMPUS AREAS. A FEW CARS LIFTED AND FLIPPED OVER... SEVERAL TREES UPROOTED AS WELL AS POSSIBLE STRUCTURAL DAMAGE TO AN APARTMENT BUILDING IN THE WYNMOOR COMMUNITY. TRACTOR-TRAILER FLIPPED OVER ON TURNPIKE NEAR COCONUT CREEK PARKWAY IN SAME AREA. AT LEAST ONE PERSON TRANSPORTED TO HOSPITAL WITH NON-LIFE THREATENING INJURIES.
TREES AND POWER LINES DOWN IN INDUSTRIAL PARK AT 1700 BLOCK OF BLOUNT ROAD IN POMPANO BEACH. MEDIA REPORTS ALSO SHOW VEHICLE DAMAGE IN THIS AREA.

LARGE BRANCHES SNAPPED OFF TREE IN FRONT YARD OF HOME AND ONTO CAR IN DRIVEWAY WITH ADDITIONAL DAMAGE TO TREE TRUNK. WINDS ESTIMATED AROUND 40-50 MPH AT TIME.

REPORTS FROM MULTIPLE SOURCES OF TREE AND POWER LINE DAMAGE FROM DELRAY BEACH TO BOYNTON BEACH AND OCEAN RIDGE. LIKELY CAUSED BY TORNADO WHICH MOVED N-NE FROM ATLANTIC AVENUE AND HOMEWOOD BLVD TO ALONG SOUTH FEDERAL HIGHWAY IN BOYNTON BEACH. A SURVEY TEAM WILL LIKELY NOT BE SENT TO AREA AS MEDIA AND LOCAL OFFICIALS ARE PROVIDING SPECIFIC DAMAGE AND LOCATION INFORMATION. BASED ON CURRENT REPORTS... DAMAGE WOULD BE CONSISTENT WITH AN EF-0. UPDATES WILL BE PROVIDED AS MORE INFORMATION IS GATHERED.

TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN RIGHT ON FORT LAUDERDALE BEACH AT THE 600 BLOCK OF SEABREEZE BLVD. A FEW SMALL BOATS ON THE BEACH WERE OVERTURNED... SOME CHAIRS WERE FLIPPED... AND A COUPLE OF SMALL SIGNS WERE BLOWN DOWN. NO DAMAGE WAS NOTED ON THE WEST INLAND SIDE OF A1A AND THE CIRCULATION LIKELY REACHED THE SURFACE JUST BEFORE MOVING OVER THE WATER.

TWO VIDEOS WERE RECEIVED OF A WATERSPOUT JUST OFF FORT LAUDERDALE BEACH WHICH INITIALLY TOUCHED DOWN ON THE SAND AT THE 600 BLOCK OF A1A SEABREEZE BLVD. THE WATERSPOUT MOVED N-NE AND WAS OBSERVED ON VIDEO FOR ABOUT 5 MINUTES.
